steps.t: Lamlor can be found at the First Circle of Minas Tirith. You have been summoned by Lamlor to aid Gondor on the eve of battle.
Bregdal can be found in the village of Crithost in Talath Anor. You should seek out and speak with Bregdal.
The drumming sounds are coming from an area in the forest north-west of the Grey Wood. You should investigate the drumming sounds.
Ghân-buri-Ghân is in the village of Drû Bhûta in Taur Drúadan. You should speak with Ghân-buri-Ghân, the chieftain of the Drúedain.
